title: cheirostylis glandulifera
intro: Cheirostylis glandulifera, also known as the glandular Cheirostylis or glandular Liparis, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The medicinal properties of Cheirostylis glandulifera are attributed to its high content of alkaloids and saponins, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. Cheirostylis glandulifera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat specific health conditions or to promote overall well-being.
